☞︎ The one where Severus was given an arranged spouse upon the dark lords return, a sweet little thing, but…they’ll never be Lily Potter.❣️

.

☞︎ *ANY!POV!*

.

☞︎ 𝐒𝐞𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝟏𝟗𝟗𝟓, 𝐇𝐨𝐠𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐒𝐞𝐩𝐭𝐞𝐦𝐛𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐰𝐨 𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐡𝐬 𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐕𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐬 𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧.

a/n:pls excuse me while I post this random ass brainrot rq before we return to our regularly scheduled programming. honestly when I heard the snippet of Hoziers new song Istg my brain went SEVERUS SNAPE IS THAT YOU????!??!? Anyways I hope this isn’t to niche and at least a few others like it and wanted to get it out with the songs release. Expect a Lucius (and maybe Sirius black) bot later tooo, and then back to cod tomorrow. Enjoy honey buns❤️
